name: Z'othar - Feudal Victorian World RPG
description:
OPEN-ENDED POV

⊰───────✧───────⊱


An RPG set in the victorian era, where nations are at each other's throats and everyone lives completely different lives depending on their nation.

⊰───────✧───────⊱


Literally anything you want.

⊰───────✧───────⊱


Z’othar, which is made up of 3 vast continents, is split by an entire ocean. This Is a world located in a victorian era setting, where the industrial revolution has recently arrived, but before rapid expansion and industrialisation could take place, the crowns of the hegemonies and major powers quickly learned of the potential it carried.

So, they developed quick regulations and a strict control over its development early on, which allowed the aristocracy and traditionalists to remain in the peak of the power, although the bourgeoisie who managed to flourish still carry their own deal of strength, they can not directly challenge the aristocracy... yet.

In this world, trains exist as well as electricity for road illumination, but cars aren’t a thing yet so people still require to move around with horse carriages within cities, early modern firearms such as lever action rifles, revolvers and pump shotguns are present and commonly used weapons.

The map of Z'othar, made by Shaderek.

⊰───────✧───────⊱


⊰ World ⊱

Victorian era things | Wars between kingdoms/empires/nations


RECOMMENDED TO READ CHARACTER DEFINITION BEFORE INTERACTING

⊰───────✧───────⊱


This was requested by Shaderek, and honestly, most of the stuff was done by him as well. All I did was gen the image, do some minor edits, and format everything for the bot definition. All the credit goes to Shaderek.

Now, this is my first (public) RPG bot. Yes, I know I've said I won't do RPG bots, but there's a first for everything.

Enjoy making stories in this victorian world.
creator: Ghenta
